missingEdge: Closed: the three source-verified renderer owners now emit twelve governed-conformant Markdown outputs with current structural, checker-read-ahead, range, ASCII, finding-learning, and epistemic-process controls.

citations.evidenceRole: worker-observed reviewer-fast failures after successful UC-02 execution
reviewer-accepted renderer repair and twelve-output conformance closure

impact: Closed: all twenty generated outputs are current and all twelve governed Markdown outputs pass the applicable checker surface. The separately retained UC-02 9/9 runtime-to-enforcement receipt remains unchanged.

closeCondition.conditionText: A separate governed repair updates the three actual renderer owners, regenerates the twelve Markdown outputs without rerunning UC-02, and passes reviewer-fast plus closure gates.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen if a later phase-governance generator run emits a governed Markdown output that fails current structural, checker-read-ahead, range-fidelity, or ASCII controls.
